routineDetail.label: Label
routineDetail.couldNotSaveRoutine: Paperclip could not save the routine.
routineDetail.couldNotStartRoutineRun: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
routineDetail.couldNotUpdateRoutine: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routineDetail.couldNotCreateTrigger: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
routineDetail.routineCadenceSaved: The routine cadence update was saved.
routineDetail.couldNotUpdateTrigger: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
routineDetail.couldNotDeleteTrigger: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
routineDetail.couldNotRotateWebhookSecret: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
routineDetail.selectCompanyToViewRoutines: Select a company to view routines.
routineDetail.setDefaultAgentFirst: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routineDetail.saveSecretNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
routineDetail.defaultAgentRequiredBanner: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
routineDetail.concurrencyCoalesceIfActive: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
routineDetail.concurrencyAlwaysEnqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
routineDetail.concurrencySkipIfActive: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.
routineDetail.catchUpSkipMissed: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
routineDetail.catchUpEnqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
routineDetail.signingModeBearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
routineDetail.signingModeHmacSha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
routineDetail.signingModeGithubHmac: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
routineDetail.signingModeNone: No authentication — the webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.

invite.awaiting_approval: Your request is still awaiting approval. {approverLabel} must approve your request to join.
invite.visit_settings_to_approve: Ask them to visit Company Settings → Access to approve your request.
invite.refresh_after_approval: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
invite.expired_or_used: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
invite.request_not_approved: This join request was not approved.
invite.already_used: This invite has already been used.
invite.invited_to_join: You've been invited to join Paperclip
invite.review_agent_details: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
invite.create_account_first: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
invite.account_ready: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
invite.create_agent_approval: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {companyDisplayName}.
invite.start_with_account: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {companyDisplayName}.
invite.use_matching_account: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite.
invite.fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
invite.name: Name
invite.already_signed_up: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
invite.no_account_yet: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
invite.account_exists_sign_in: An account already exists for {emailLabel}. Sign in below to continue with this invite.
invite.email_password_no_match: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
invite.account_may_exist: An account may already exist for {emailLabel}. Try signing in instead.
invite.will_submit_or_complete: This will {setupPaperclip} or submit or complete your join request for {companyDisplayName}.

inviteUxLab.page_title: Invite and signup UX review surface
inviteUxLab.page_description: This page collects the current invite landing, signup, approval-result, and company invite-management states in one place so styling changes can be reviewed without recreating each backend condition by hand.
inviteUxLab.states_loading_access: Invite loading, access-check, missing-token, and unavailable states
inviteUxLab.states_inline_auth: Inline account creation and sign-in variants, including feedback/error copy
inviteUxLab.states_accept_transitions: Human accept, agent request, and auto-accept transitions
inviteUxLab.states_pending_joined: Pending approval, joined-now, claim secret, and onboarding result screens
inviteUxLab.states_company_invite: Company invite creation, copied-link, history, empty, and permission-error states
inviteUxLab.lab_top_level_description: Small cards for the fast-return invite states that do not render the full split-screen layout.
inviteUxLab.lab_invite_landing_description: These frames mirror the production invite surface closely enough to review spacing, hierarchy, and control states while keeping data fixture-driven.
inviteUxLab.lab_result_description: These are the post-submit states returned from invite acceptance, including optional claim and onboarding metadata.
inviteUxLab.lab_standalone_auth_description: The general `/auth` page uses a different composition from invite landing. These previews keep both sign-in and sign-up variants visible.
inviteUxLab.lab_company_settings_description: This section captures the board-side invite creation flow, copied-link state, audit table, and the edge states that are otherwise tedious to stage.
inviteUxLab.status_loading_body: Shown while invite summary, deployment mode, or auth session data is still loading.
inviteUxLab.status_checking_body: Shown after sign-in while the app verifies whether the current user already belongs to the invited company.
inviteUxLab.status_invalid_token_body: The token is missing entirely, so the page short-circuits before any invite lookup.
inviteUxLab.status_not_available_body: Used for expired, revoked, already-consumed, or otherwise missing invites.
inviteUxLab.status_bootstrap_complete_body: Result screen for bootstrap CEO invites after setup has been accepted successfully.
inviteUxLab.status_auto_accept_body: Signed-in human users skip the extra button click and move straight into join submission.
inviteUxLab.status_already_member_body: Acceptance stays disabled and the page redirects into the company once membership is confirmed.
inviteUxLab.status_result_surfaces_body: Both pending-approval and joined-now confirmations are included below with claim and onboarding extras.
inviteUxLab.summary_invited_to_join: You've been invited to join Paperclip
inviteUxLab.inline_sign_up_description: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for Acme Robotics.
inviteUxLab.inline_sign_in_description: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
inviteUxLab.footer_sign_up: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
inviteUxLab.footer_sign_in: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
inviteUxLab.agent_description: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in Acme Robotics.
inviteUxLab.accept_description_auto_accept: Submitting your join request for Acme Robotics.
inviteUxLab.accept_description_member: This account already belongs to Acme Robotics.
inviteUxLab.accept_description_default: This will submit or complete your join request for Acme Robotics.
inviteUxLab.accept_error_member: This account already belongs to the company.
inviteUxLab.result_request_description: Board User must approve your request to join.
inviteUxLab.result_joined_description: Your account already matched the approved invite, so the board can be opened immediately.
inviteUxLab.result_ask_approve_description: Ask them to visit Company Settings → Access to approve your request.
inviteUxLab.footer_refresh_approved: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
inviteUxLab.auth_sign_in_description: Use your email and password to access this instance.
inviteUxLab.auth_sign_up_description: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
inviteUxLab.auth_preview_description: This frame mirrors the production auth surface so spacing, label density, button treatments, and desktop composition are easy to compare.
inviteUxLab.create_invite_description: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
inviteUxLab.invite_single_use_note: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
inviteUxLab.invite_history_note: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
inviteUxLab.latest_invite_link_description: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
inviteUxLab.invite_history_description: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
inviteUxLab.empty_history_description: No invites have been created for this company yet.
inviteUxLab.permission_error_description: You do not have permission to manage company invites.

cliAuth.approve_body: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.

cliAuth.requires_admin: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.

issueChatThread.renderer_error_title: Chat renderer hit an internal state error.
issueChatThread.renderer_error_body: Showing a safe fallback transcript instead of crashing the issues page.
issueChatThread.save_feedback_sharing_description: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
issueChatThread.vote_saved_locally: This vote is always saved locally.
issueChatThread.to_share_vote: to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose
issueChatThread.to_keep_votes_local: to keep this vote and future votes local.
